channel.title: File on Notities
channel.description: Recent content in File on Notities

item.title: How to burn an *.iso file to CD or DVD in Windows
item.description:
In File Explorer right-click on the *.ISO file and choose Properties.
Then, click Change from the General tab, choose Windows Explorer, and click OK.
Next, save the change by clicking Apply > OK
Now right click on the *.ISO file and choose: Burn disc image or on: Show more options to find this.
